message:
feat(core): add fault-domain isolation and crash-only service contracts

Adds FaultDomain (5 domains), DomainHealth (5 states), CrashOnlyContract,
FaultEvent, FaultDomainState, FaultIsolationConfig, FaultIsolationManager
with record_fault/attempt_restart/restart_succeeded/restart_failed/
mark_degraded/un_isolate/reset, auto-isolation on max_restarts exceeded,
cooldown enforcement, plus degradation/snapshot/log types. 27 unit tests.
(ft-2p9cb.6.1.1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
